name: Wazuh
description: Typed desktop plugin that exposes bounded Wazuh alert index queries through manifest-defined actions.

setupFields.label: API Base URL
setupFields.description: Optional OpenSearch index base URL. Leave blank when the desktop runtime is configured elsewhere.

setupFields.label: Auth Token
setupFields.description: Optional credential used for bounded alert-index queries.

setupFields.label: Index Patterns
setupFields.description: Optional index patterns used for sync and runbook query defaults.

fields.label: Index URL
fields.description: OpenSearch index base URL, for example https://wazuh.example.com:9200.

fields.label: Index Username
fields.description: Username used for the Wazuh/OpenSearch index API.

fields.label: Index Password
fields.description: Password used for the Wazuh/OpenSearch index API.

actions.title: Search Alerts
actions.description: Query Wazuh alert indexes with a bounded read-only OpenSearch search request.

fields.label: Offset
fields.description: Optional page offset for bounded sync or large alert result sets.

fields.label: Index Pattern
fields.description: Optional Wazuh index pattern such as wazuh-alerts-4.x-*.

fields.label: Since
fields.description: Optional lower bound on @timestamp for bounded sync reads.

fields.label: Until
fields.description: Optional upper bound on @timestamp for bounded sync reads.

triggers.title: Alert Detected
triggers.description: Poll-driven trigger for newly detected Wazuh alerts in a configured index pattern.
